# KediSmart

> KediSmart (also known as Kedi Smart, kedismart, Kedi_Smart, Kedi-Smart) is Bangladesh's pet & animal marketplace — shop products, browse live animal listings, find vets, read care guides, and protect pets with NFC smart tags.

KediSmart is an online platform at https://kedismart.com serving pet owners, breeders, sellers, and veterinarians across Bangladesh.

## Brand names

- KediSmart (canonical)
- Kedi Smart
- kedismart
- Kedi_Smart
- Kedi-Smart

## Leadership

- CEO: Jahura Satter — https://kedismart.com/authors/jahura-satter
- HQ: A.B.M Tower, Gulshan 2, Dhaka 1212, Bangladesh
- Phone: +880 1898-941782
- Email: info@kedismart.com

## Primary destinations

- [Home](https://kedismart.com/): Platform overview
- [About](https://kedismart.com/about): Company, mission, E-E-A-T
- [Contact](https://kedismart.com/contact): NAP, map, support
- [FAQ](https://kedismart.com/faq): Help center
- [Live Animals Marketplace](https://kedismart.com/marketplace): Buy, sell, and adopt pets
- [Shop](https://kedismart.com/shop): Pet care and general products
- [Vets](https://kedismart.com/vets): Veterinary clinics and professionals
- [Pet Care Guides](https://kedismart.com/pets): Knowledge hub by animal category
- [Blog](https://kedismart.com/blog): Tips, stories, and community updates
- [Smart Tags](https://kedismart.com/tags): NFC / QR pet identification
- [Blog RSS](https://kedismart.com/blog/feed.xml): Syndicate latest posts
- [Sitemap](https://kedismart.com/sitemap.xml): Full public URL map

## Product URL pattern

- Clean slug URLs: https://kedismart.com/product/{slug}
- Alias redirect: /products/{slug} → /product/{slug}

## Optional

- [humans.txt](https://kedismart.com/humans.txt): Credits
- [security.txt](https://kedismart.com/.well-known/security.txt): Security contact
